title: Jiggs and Maggie in Court
writer: George McManus, Barney Gerard, Edward F. Cline
actors: Joe Yule, Renie Riano, George McManus
plot: Maggie is resentful of being pointed out and laughed at in public because she resembles the cartoon character in the George McManus comic strip "Bringing Up Father." She visits McManus in his studio office and tries to persuade hi...
